summary: Iteration 56: Unified Global Search Feature - Complete Testing. Backend: 14/14 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All search UI features verified via Playwright.

issues: Minor accessibility warning: DialogContent missing DialogTitle for screen readers (console warning only, not user-facing)

passed_tests: GET /api/search/unified?q=taylor returns records grouped by type (17 records found) - PASSED
GET /api/search/unified?q=tay+swift returns Taylor Swift records (fuzzy matching) - PASSED (12 records)
GET /api/search/unified?q=lover returns matching records - PASSED (3 Lover albums)
GET /api/search/discogs?q=taylor+swift returns Discogs catalog results - PASSED (20 results)
Hidden users (is_hidden=true) NOT in search results - PASSED (admin excluded)
Search requires authentication (401 without token) - PASSED
Frontend: Search opens from nav magnifying glass icon - PASSED
Frontend: Typing 'taylor' shows grouped results with Records section header - PASSED
Frontend: Empty state shows 'no results for [query]' with bee emoji - PASSED
Frontend: Results include '+ collection' button on hover for records - PASSED
Frontend: Collectors section shows Follow button - PASSED
Database indexes exist on records.artist, records.title, listings.artist+album - VERIFIED
critical_code_review_comments: search.py Lines 11-26: Scoring algorithm properly ranks exact matches (100) > starts-with (60) > contains (40) > word present (20)
search.py Lines 45-51: Regex filter correctly splits query into words for fuzzy matching
search.py Lines 95-100: Hidden user filtering working correctly - filters both is_hidden=true AND hidden_user_ids
GlobalSearch.js Lines 180-186: Empty state correctly shows 'no results for [query]' with bee emoji 🐝
GlobalSearch.js Lines 213-218: '+ collection' button appears on hover with proper data-testid
server.py Lines 84-88: Search indexes created at startup for performance

test_credentials.note: Admin account has is_hidden=true, correctly excluded from search results

seed_data_creation: None - used existing real data from katieintheafterglow's collection
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 56: Unified Global Search feature fully tested. 1) /api/search/unified endpoint works with fuzzy matching (splits query into words, regex per word). 2) Response times consistently under 150ms. 3) Frontend GlobalSearch.js shows unified view with Records, Collectors, Posts, Listings sections. 4) Empty state has bee emoji. 5) Hidden users properly excluded. 6) Database indexes verified: records.artist, records.title, listings.artist+album, posts.caption+content (text index).
